title: Gemma Playground: AI Edge Gallery
summary: Ian Ballantyne demonstrates the Google AI Edge Gallery app running Gemma on a Pixel 10 Pro for on-device tasks including image understanding, audio transcription, agent-based app routing, and offline object identification. The app enables local inference without requiring network connectivity.
writeup: Ian Ballantyne demonstrates the Google AI Edge Gallery app running Gemma on a Pixel 10 Pro, showing on-device tasks: image understanding, audio transcription, agent-based app routing, and offline object identification. The point is local inference, model execution on the device itself without network connectivity. The takeaways center on what Gemma handles directly on hardware, covering image classification, structured output, and agent orchestration.
